examples: A monkey has a prehensile tail.
A prehensile thumb is not FOR grasping.
Long and slightly prehensile, but more like the tail of a panther than a monkey.
In some alternate plane of the space-time continuum dinosaurs with prehensile claws rule the Earth, and purple monkeys are their servants.
For these moments, her nearly prehensile-looking feet, which have become as much her signature as her extravagant leg extensions, were not quite bare.
